metadata.description: JET legal tools for the North Dakota courts and bar — bench-memo, opinion-editing, interpretive-panel, rehearing, citation, and brief-compliance skills for Claude. Not an official product of the North Dakota Supreme Court.

plugins.name: jetmemo
plugins.description: North Dakota Supreme Court bench memos from publicly filed appellate briefs and record documents.

plugins.name: jetredline
plugins.description: Edit and proofread ND appellate opinions, orders, and bench memos — tracked-changes output with Redbook and Bluebook checks.

plugins.name: jetpanel
plugins.description: Multi-perspective interpretive analysis for close statutory and constitutional questions.

plugins.name: jetrehearing
plugins.description: Analyze petitions for rehearing (N.D.R.App.P. 40) and draft a cross-check memo.

plugins.name: jetbriefcheck
plugins.description: Check ND appellate brief PDFs for compliance with the Rules of Appellate Procedure.

plugins.name: jetcite
plugins.description: Parse American legal citations and generate links to official government sources.
